mnemonics: H.O.T. C.A.M. (Hierarchical, Object, Tracking, Classification, Action, Motion) - For remembering the key pillars of advanced CV topics covered.
keyPoints: Deep Learning Architectures (CNNs, R-CNN, YOLO, GANs)
commonMistakes: Confusing object detection (where is it?) with image classification (what is it?)
Using inappropriate evaluation metrics for a task (e.g., accuracy for imbalanced segmentation)
Neglecting the computational complexity and real-time applicability of an algorithm
